data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and workflow docs to reflect behavioral testing standard and testing_mode
data.description:
## Description

Update project documentation to reflect the behavioral testing standard and testing_mode system implemented in epic 8df3-61d0.

### Steps
1. Update CLAUDE.md to document:
   - The shared behavioral testing standard at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
   - The testing_mode classification system (RED/GREEN/UPDATE)
   - How implementation-plan emits testing_mode per task
   - How sprint routes tasks by testing_mode
   - How fix-bug uses the testing model
2. Ensure existing workflow docs accurately describe updated test-writing behavior

### File Impact
- CLAUDE.md — Edit (add testing_mode and shared standard documentation)

## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents shared behavioral testing standard
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents testing_mode system
  Verify: grep -q "testing_mode" CLAUDE.md
